positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a silhouette of towering, ancient redwood trees and delicate, glowing foxfire patches on the forest floor. The overall style is contemporary vector art mixed with ethereal watercolor washes. The composition should be perfectly symmetrical, creating a powerful, centered focal point. The color palette must be limited to deep midnight blues, rich forest greens, soft gold glow (for the foxfire), and matte black for the silhouettes. Excellent contrast is paramount. Designed as a repeatable, high-contrast textile print on a white background. Studio lighting setup, highly detailed, 8k, clean lines, art deco influence.
negative: blur, low resolution, watermark, logo, text, signature, bad anatomy, cropped, distorted, extra limbs, poorly drawn, grainy, realistic photo, deep shadows, muddy colors
